name: Bronze 24x30 Garage Shed Plan - A Craftsman Garage with Wood + Brick Exterior & Expansive Gable Roof
open_features: A spacious footprint with a tall gable roof provides excellent vertical clearance for tools, vehicles, and overhead storage.
Straightforward framing, simplified roof lines, and clean layouts make this design easy to build for beginners and experienced contractors alike.
A large paneled overhead door with glass inserts allows seamless access for cars, trucks, equipment, or workshop materials.
Wood lap siding paired with stone-look brick adds texture, contrast, and durability - giving the Bronze a balanced rustic-modern aesthetic.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Bronze Garage Shed Plan - a 24x30 premium garage and workspace solution designed for efficiency, style, and clean architectural craftsmanship. With its high gable roof, rich horizontal wood siding, and durable brick wainscoting, the Bronze blends modern durability with warm, rustic charm. Whether you're building a two-vehicle garage, a full workshop, a home business studio, or a versatile storage hub, the Bronze 24x30 offers increased square foota...
